task_completion.description: Open the Electrical Engineering Calculations app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Electrical Engineering Calculations app interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Delta-to-Star (Δ-Y) conversion tool
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays a tool or section specifically for Delta-to-Star, Delta-to-Wye, or Δ-Y resistance conversion.

task_completion.description: Enter 30 Ohms for the first Delta resistor
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '30' is entered into the input field for the first Delta resistor (often labeled Ra, Rab, or R1).

task_completion.description: Enter 60 Ohms for the second Delta resistor
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '60' is entered into the input field for the second Delta resistor (often labeled Rb, Rbc, or R2).

task_completion.description: Enter 90 Ohms for the third Delta resistor
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '90' is entered into the input field for the third Delta resistor (often labeled Rc, Rca, or R3).

task_completion.description: Verify the correct Star (Wye) equivalent resistances are calculated and visible
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calculated Star (Wye) equivalent resistances are visible in the output section of the app, specifically showing the values 15, 10, and 30.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of the app
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Android GUI of the Electrical Engineering Calculations app, not a terminal or command-line interface.

integrity.description: The agent used the correct application rather than a text editor or browser
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs and outputs are displayed within the actual calculator app's interface, not typed into a notepad, web browser, or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not print the expected answers via terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows or script outputs visible on the screen displaying the expected answers (15, 10, 30).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using the 'com.hsn.electricalcalculations' app for a Delta to Star conversion. The correct input values for the Delta network are 30, 60, and 90 Ohms. The expected output Star (Wye) resistance values are 15, 10, and 30 Ohms. The VLM should verify these specific numbers are visible in the app's calculation results.
